creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Category: japanese

Here is an ELFization patch for japanese/tk80.
it includes an update to tk8.0p2 to tk8.0.3.

Fix: please apply following patch.
NOTE: delete file japanese/tk80/patches/patch-ad. this file is obsolete.
BEGIN>---8<cut here>8---
